transactions.desc: The Rangers recalled Teodo from Triple-A Round Rock on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Bratt from Triple-A Reno to start Sunday's game against the Dodgers.
The Giants optioned Bivens to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants reinstated Foley (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Red Sox activated Sogard (oblique) from the 10-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Worcester on Sunday.
The Mets recalled Thornton from Triple-A Syracuse ahead of his start against the Red Sox on Sunday.
The Marlins recalled Fulton from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Nationals designated Krook for assignment Sunday.
The Nationals recalled Ortiz from Triple-A Rochester on Sunday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat third in the series finale against the Yankees.
The Reds recalled Petty from Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Houston Astros traded INF Braden Shewmake to the Milwaukee Brewers.
The Brewers reinstated Crow (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Nashville.
The Brewers designated Jones for assignment Sunday.
The Brewers acquired Shewmake from the Astros on Sunday in exchange for cash.
The Red Sox recalled Bello from Triple-A Worcester on Sunday.
The Red Sox designated Coulombe for assignment following Saturday's 4-0 win over the Mets, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
The Orioles reinstated Hiraldo (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk on Saturday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Dodgers designated Barnes for assignment Saturday.
The Dodgers optioned Hurt to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Dodgers reinstated Knack (chest) from the 60-day injured list Saturday.
The Padres reinstated Waldron (forearm) from the injured list Saturday.
The Padres optioned Brito to Triple-A El Paso on Saturday.
The Cubs designated Woodford for assignment Saturday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
The Cubs reinstated Maton (knee) from the injured list Saturday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
Murdock was added to the active roster as Pittsburgh's 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against Milwaukee.
The Pirates optioned Brannigan to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday.
The Pirates optioned Harrington to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday.
The Pirates activated Gonzalez to the major-league roster Saturday.
The Rockies recalled Criswell from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies optioned Shook to Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
